notes: Scans project state on session start using ship status, ship agent list, and config file detection
Detects existing provider configs (CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md)
Presents context-aware greeting based on whether this is the Ship repo or a user project
Teaches by showing real state rather than reciting documentation
Never runs ship use during tutorial to avoid overwriting the active session
Covers agents, skills, MCP servers, permissions, compilation pipeline, and registry
